name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle surface. Hosts the rabbit-spec-creator subagent (drafts AND writes a new feature's initial docs/spec.md, returning a {path_written, summary} handoff) with its input assembler scripts/dispatch-spec-creator.py, and the rabbit-spec-update skill (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.19.1 -> 1.20.0, #1079 designed-deprecation cleanup): the defensive relocation shim in scripts/dispatch-spec-creator.py is retired now that contract/scripts/build-prompt.py anchors the prompts dir at the canonical single-`.rabbit` runtime root upstream (#1073) — the in-dispatcher relocation was a verified no-op in both modes. Inv 3 clause (f) rewritten to STATE the upstream guarantee (drops the relocation-mechanism description); clause (d)'s stdlib list narrowed back to argparse/glob/os/subprocess/sys/pathlib (shutil + importlib.util removed). contract.md drops the rabbit-cage runtime_root.py INVOKE (no longer imported). Numbering stays contiguous 1..8.
